candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line at the top of the income statement; best semantic match for total revenue/sales.
Appears equal to Operating revenue and may be used as the reported top-line label in some periods; suitable fallback priority label.

variables.notes: Selected the most direct revenue label first, with the synonymous top-line fallback second. These should be treated as priority labels, not summed.

No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales / direct service cost line is present on the provided income statement. Operating expenses are shown mainly as overhead and D&A, so COGS appears not separately reported.

candidates.why: Clear operating overhead component; personnel costs are standard SG&A-type expense.
Broad operating overhead bucket and appropriate SG&A component when no explicit SG&A subtotal is shown.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the best overhead components and excluded depreciation/amortisation, impairments, finance items, and totals/subtotals.

candidates.why: R&D-related label exists, but it is a balance sheet asset rollforward item rather than an income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: R&D-related label exists, but it is a balance sheet accumulated amortization/impairment line, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated income statement R&D expense line is present. Balance sheet R&D asset lines should not be used for XRD expense.

candidates.why: Primary recurring financing cost line and best match for interest expense.
Recurring lease-related interest cost; should be added to interest expense if reported separately.
Broad finance total, but underlying recurring components are available, so it should not be used to avoid double counting and inclusion of non-interest items.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest cost components and excluded net finance totals, FX, fair value changes, and other non-recurring/non-interest items.

candidates.why: Best equity line because it excludes non-controlling interests here; confirmed by 2020 where Total equity plus Non-controlling interests equals TOTAL EQUITY.
Includes non-controlling interests in at least some years, so less suitable for BE when MIB is mapped separately.

variables.notes: Chose Total equity because it appears to exclude non-controlling interests, avoiding double counting with MIB. Did not use TOTAL EQUITY because it appears to include minority interest in some years.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet line for minority/non-controlling interest; preferred for MIB.
Equivalent alternate label and suitable fallback across years.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet minority-interest labels as priority list. These should be treated as alternatives across years, not summed.
